item.title: KylePorterNS: Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 2h It makes sense that Rory the player would evolve along with Rory the person. But also I n
item.description:
Kyle Porter @KylePorterNS · 2h It makes sense that Rory the player would evolve along with Rory the person. But also I never saw it coming.
Newsletter today presented by @hbgolfusa . De normalsport.com 3 1 18 7 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 6h . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emphas
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 6h . @chambleebrandel made this point on Saturday night, and I want to re-emphasize it after the fact. It was cool to see Rory fix his swing by himself on the range after a bad day. No coach, no Trackman, no training aids. Just the confidence that he knew his swing. 12 13 774 58 mil

Michael S. Kim @Mike_kim714 · 2h En respuesta a @KVanValkenburg y @chambleebrandel Idk why for pro golfers it’s kind of looked down upon having lots of coaches. A QB has HC, OC, QB coach, personal QB coach, trainer, physio, mental coach and more. Same for NBA. Yet golfers have more than one coach and it’s not as pure(?) or whatever it might be. 34 8 391 29 mil

Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 2h En respuesta a @Mike_kim714 y @chambleebrandel Football is almost never thought of or written about in romantic terms. It’s violence, it’s war, it’s tribal, is a test of masculinity. Golf is gets written about in artistic terms, man or woman alone with their thoughts and fears in the arena of nature. Fair or unfair, that’s Mostrar más 5 44 4 mil

item.title: KVanValkenburg: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 2h The truest thing David Simon ever wrote isn’t a line from The Wire or The Corn
item.description: Kevin Van Valkenburg @KVanValkenburg · 2h The truest thing David Simon ever wrote isn’t a line from The Wire or The Corner, it’s a line from a piece he wrote about being a journalist for Esquire: “A newspaper can’t love you back.” Cita Brendan Farrington @bsfarrington · 11 abr. How drastically have things changed at @AP? In February 2020, before the COVID shutdown, I asked for a Friday and Monday off during the legislative session to see my dying father. They said no, I was too critical for our Florida Statehouse coverage. I never got to say goodbye to 3 1 48 15 mil

item.title:
NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 2h Friend: Two putts and we win the match
Me: De Golf Channel 7 8 245 90 mil

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 2h Until next year, old friend. 3 2 121 7 mil
